metadata.title: Cardium — Virtual Cards for Media Buyers | Instant Visa & Mastercard for Google Ads, Meta & Bing
metadata.description: Issue unlimited virtual Visa and Mastercard cards in seconds. Fund with a card, manage your balance, and scale your ad spend across Google Ads, Meta, Bing, and every platform.

hero.badge: Virtual cards built for Google, Meta & Bing Ads
hero.subtitle: Issue unlimited virtual Visa and Mastercard cards in seconds. Fund with a card, manage your balance, and start spending instantly on Google Ads, Meta, Bing, and every ad platform. Scale without limits.

logos.title: Works with the platforms you already use

features.title: Everything you need to scale your ad spend
features.subtitle: A complete virtual card infrastructure built for modern marketing teams. From instant card issuing to advanced analytics, Cardium gives you full control over every dollar.

instantCards.title: Instant Card Issuing
instantCards.description: Create unlimited virtual Visa and Mastercard cards in seconds. Each card gets its own BIN, balance, and granular spending controls. Perfect for isolating campaigns and tracking spend per account.

flexibleTopUp.title: Flexible Funding
flexibleTopUp.description: Fund your balance with a card or wire transfer — from $10 to $10,000+. Instant top-ups at competitive rates with no hidden fees. Your balance is ready to spend immediately.

teamAccounts.title: Team Management
teamAccounts.description: Distribute cards and budgets across your entire team. Set role-based access controls, individual spending limits, and monitor all card activity in real-time from one dashboard.

api.title: Powerful REST API
api.description: Full REST API for programmatic card management, balance operations, transaction history, and webhook notifications. Build custom automations and integrate with your existing tools.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Track spend patterns across campaigns, monitor ROI per ad account, and export detailed reports. Real-time dashboards with custom alerts keep you informed.

security.title: 3DS Security
security.description: Every transaction is protected with 3D Secure 2.0 authentication. Our PCI DSS Level 1 compliant infrastructure ensures your funds and data are always safe.

benefits.title: Built for performance marketers
benefits.subtitle: Every feature is designed to help you spend smarter, scale faster, and stay in complete control of your advertising budgets.

speed.title: Lightning-Fast Card Issuing
speed.description: Stop waiting for bank approvals. Create virtual cards instantly and start running campaigns in minutes, not days. Our streamlined process means you never miss an opportunity.
points: No paperwork or bank visits required

global.description: Run campaigns in 150+ countries with cards that work everywhere. Our multi-BIN infrastructure ensures high approval rates on every ad platform, regardless of geography.
points: Accepted on all major ad networks worldwide
GBP, EUR, and USD currency support

automation.title: Automated Spend Management
automation.description: Set up rules and let Cardium handle the rest. Automatic top-ups, budget alerts, and card rotation keep your campaigns running smoothly around the clock.

items.name: Sarah Chen
items.content: Cardium transformed our ad spend workflow. We went from managing 50 cards manually to 500+ cards with automated controls. The time savings alone paid for itself in the first week. Absolute game changer for any serious media buyer.

items.name: Marcus Rodriguez
items.content: The flexible top-up model is perfect — we just add funds when we need them. No monthly fees eating into our margins. The straightforward funding saves us thousands in fees every month.

items.name: Elena Volkova
items.content: Finally, a payment platform that truly understands media buyers. The real-time analytics, spending controls, and multi-BIN support are exactly what our 40-person team needed to scale confidently.

items.name: James Park
items.content: We tested every virtual card provider on the market. Cardium had the highest approval rates, the fastest card issuing, and the best support team. We moved our entire operation over in a weekend.

items.name: Ana Petrova
items.content: Managing ad spend across 12 countries used to be a nightmare. Cardium's multi-currency support and localized BINs solved that completely. Our approval rates went from 78% to 97%.

items.name: David Kim
items.content: The API is beautifully designed. We built a custom dashboard on top of Cardium that auto-creates cards, sets budgets, and rotates payment methods — all programmatically. Incredible platform.

q1.question: How quickly can I issue a virtual card?
q1.answer: Instantly. Once your account is funded, you can create unlimited virtual cards in just a few clicks. Most users issue their first card within 3 minutes of signing up.

q2.question: How does funding work?
q2.answer: Simply choose any amount starting from $10 and fund with a card or wire transfer. Your balance is available instantly after confirmation. There are no monthly fees — you only pay a transparent service fee on deposits.

q3.question: Is there a minimum or maximum top-up amount?
q3.answer: The minimum top-up is $10. There is no maximum — fund $10, $1,000, or $50,000 depending on your campaign needs. Your full balance is available immediately to create cards and start spending.

q4.question: How does team management work?
q4.answer: You can invite team members, assign roles (admin, manager, viewer), set individual spending limits per person or per card, and monitor all card activity in real-time from your centralized dashboard.

q5.question: What ad platforms are supported?
q5.answer: Cardium cards work with all major ad platforms including Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Microsoft Ads, Snapchat, Pinterest, Amazon Ads, and 100+ more. Our multi-BIN infrastructure ensures high approval rates everywhere.

q6.question: Can I use Cardium for non-advertising purchases?
q6.answer: Yes! While Cardium is optimized for media buying, our virtual Visa and Mastercard cards work everywhere these networks are accepted — SaaS subscriptions, e-commerce, hosting, and more.

q7.question: Which currencies are supported?
q7.answer: Cardium supports GBP, EUR, and USD. You can fund your balance and issue cards in any of these currencies. Conversion between currencies is handled automatically at competitive rates with no hidden markups.

about.title: About Cardium
about.subtitle: We're building the future of digital payments for modern marketing teams. Our mission is to make virtual card infrastructure accessible, powerful, and easy to use for businesses of every size.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To democratize access to virtual card infrastructure, enabling businesses of all sizes to scale their digital ad spend with confidence, security, and transparency. We believe every media buyer — from solo freelancers to enterprise agencies — deserves powerful payment tools without complexity or monthly fees.

story.title: Our Story
story.description: Founded by a team of fintech veterans and media buying experts, Cardium was born from a simple frustration: existing payment solutions weren't built for the speed and scale that modern digital marketing demands. After years of dealing with slow bank approvals, limited card counts, rigid pricing tiers, and opaque fees, we set out to build something better — a platform where you fund any amount and start spending immediately.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: No hidden fees, no monthly subscriptions, no surprises. A simple service fee is all you pay. We publish our rates openly.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We push the boundaries of what's possible in digital payments with cutting-edge technology and multi-BIN infrastructure.

security.title: Security First
security.description: Your trust is our foundation. PCI DSS Level 1, 3D Secure 2.0, and 256-bit encryption protect every transaction and every dollar.

support.title: Customer Focus
support.description: Your success is our success. We provide dedicated support whenever you need us, 24/7, with real humans who understand media buying.

team.title: Our Team
team.description: Cardium is built by a globally distributed team of engineers, fintech specialists, and marketing experts dedicated to creating the best virtual card platform for media buyers. We operate across 150+ countries, serving thousands of satisfied customers every day.

whyUs.title: Why Media Buyers Choose Cardium
items: No monthly fees or subscriptions — pay only when you fund your balance
Instant card issuing with multi-BIN support for high approval rates
Fund with a card or wire transfer — simple, fast, and secure
Real-time analytics and spending controls for every card
GBP, EUR, and USD currency support for global campaigns

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Insights, guides, and updates from the Cardium team. Learn how to optimize your ad spend, manage virtual cards at scale, and grow your media buying business.

posts.title: Why Virtual Cards Are Essential for Media Buying in 2025
posts.excerpt: Virtual cards have become the go-to payment method for performance marketers. They let you isolate budgets per campaign, prevent overspend, and track every dollar across Google Ads, Meta, and Bing. In this guide, we break down the key benefits: fraud protection through single-use card numbers, granular spend controls that traditional bank cards can't offer, and real-time visibility into where your ad budget is going. If you're still using a single company card for all your campaigns, here's why it's time to switch.

posts.title: 5 Proven Ways to Maximize Approval Rates on Ad Platforms
posts.excerpt: Low approval rates can silently kill your campaign performance. When your payment gets declined, ads stop running and you lose momentum. The most common causes are mismatched BINs, geographic restrictions, and velocity limits from issuing banks. We'll walk through five actionable strategies: using localized BINs that match your target region, rotating cards to avoid velocity triggers, setting appropriate spending limits, warming up new cards gradually, and monitoring decline codes to catch issues early.

posts.title: Scaling Team Spend Management Without the Chaos
posts.excerpt: When your agency grows from 5 to 50 people, ad spend management becomes a full-time job. Without the right tools, you end up with spreadsheets tracking who has which card, no visibility into real-time spend, and budget overruns that show up days later. This post covers how to implement role-based access for your team, set per-card and per-person spending limits, use real-time dashboards to spot anomalies, and automate card rotation so campaigns never pause unexpectedly.

posts.title: How to Set Up Virtual Cards for Google Ads Campaigns
posts.excerpt: Google Ads is the largest ad platform by spend, and getting your payment setup right is critical. This step-by-step tutorial covers creating a dedicated virtual card for each Google Ads account, setting the right currency to avoid conversion fees, configuring budget limits that match your daily spend targets, and troubleshooting common payment issues like address verification failures and initial spend holds.

posts.title: Managing Multi-Currency Ad Spend Across GBP, EUR, and USD
posts.excerpt: Running campaigns across regions means dealing with multiple currencies. Every conversion adds cost and complexity. This guide explains how to issue cards in GBP, EUR, or USD to match the billing currency of each ad platform, eliminating conversion fees. We also cover how to split your balance across currencies, monitor exchange rate impacts on your ROAS, and optimize your funding strategy for each market.

posts.title: Automate Your Ad Spend with the Cardium REST API
posts.excerpt: For teams managing hundreds of cards, manual management doesn't scale. The Cardium API lets you programmatically create cards, set budgets, check balances, and receive webhook notifications when transactions occur. This developer guide walks through authentication, the card creation endpoint, balance operations, and webhook setup — with code examples in Python and Node.js so you can integrate Cardium into your existing workflow.
